    • Uses of Vector in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.agent

      Gets the current position.
      Vector Agent.getDesiredPosition()
      Gets the desired position.
      Vector Agent.getGoal()
      Gets the goal.
      Vector Agent.getPosition()
      This method returns the current position of the agent.
      Vector Agent.getStart()
      Gets the start.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static void AgentMover.blockNode(Vector vector, boolean occupy, Node.Property property, Passenger passenger)
      This method blocks the agents position if the rotation is rectangular.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Vector Areamap.getDimensions()
      Get the dimensions of the area map.
      Vector Node.getPosition()
      This method returns the position of the node.
      Vector Path.getPosition(int index)
      Get the x-coordinate for the waypoint at the given index.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.ArrayList<Vector> Costmap.getSurroundingPoints(int x, int y)
      This method delivers all 8 surrounding points of a specific point in the cost map.
      Methods in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar with parameters of type Vector 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Path Path.cutToPoint(Path path, Vector point)
      Cut to point.
      Node Areamap.get(Vector point)
      Get the node at a specific location using a vector.
      int Costmap.getCost(Vector point)
      This method returns the already calculated cost of a specific point in the cost map.
      void Costmap.setCost(Vector position, int value)
      Sets the cost.
      void AreamapHandler.setStartLocation(Vector position, Agent agent)
      This map sets the start location of an agent.

      Constructor and Description
      Areamap(Vector size)
      Create a new empty area map.
      AreamapHandler(Vector dimensions, Cabin cabin)
      This is the area map constructor.

      Instantiates a new costmap.
      Node(Vector vector)
      this method constructs the Node.
      SimulationHandler(Vector dimensions, Cabin cabin, int simulationLoopIndex)
      This method constructs the RunAStar algorithm.
